content.full_text:
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA, 95814

June 26, 1990

I am the volunteer fire chief for the Eagle Lake Community Services
District and the Stones-Bengard Community Services District. I also am
the sole proprietor of McCormack Electronics Service which sells and services
two-way radio communications equipment. Please advise me of the legality of
selling communications equipment to these public districts at my cost plus
shipping and sales tax. If this is possible, these small districts will
realize a substantial savings in the occasional purchases that they might make.

Sincerely,

James P. McCormack
510-260 Stone Road
Susanville, CA, 96130

[The image appears to be a very faint or low-contrast document scan. While there is clearly text present, it is too illegible for accurate transcription. The document appears to have multiple paragraphs and possibly a signature, but the specific words and content cannot be reliably read with confidence.]
